data.description:
## Incident Overview

**Scenario Type**: Flaky CI test
**Observed**: 2026-04-29, PR #17 (worktree-20260428-202511 → main)

### Expected Behavior

test-poetry-graceful-degradation.sh completes within the 90s timeout in CI.

### Actual Behavior

The test suite logs: `[215/408] test-poetry-graceful-degradation.sh ... TIMEOUT (exceeded 90s)`

This causes Script Tests to report FAILED: 1, which causes the llm-review job to be skipped (it depends on test-scripts passing).

The test passes on main and in local runs. Intermittent — did not reproduce on two adjacent main CI runs (25125815800, 25116610217).

### Workaround

Re-run failed jobs via `gh run rerun <run-id> --failed`.

### Fix Direction

Investigate which of the 8 tests in the suite is slow. Candidates: tests that spawn subshells waiting on poetry install or venv activation. May need to mock or stub the slow operations, or increase the per-test timeout budget.
data.title: [test-poetry-graceful-degradation]: test occasionally exceeds 90s CI timeout -> Script Tests fails, llm-review skipped
